name: Szechwan Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless sirloin steak, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the clarified butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the steak cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the garlic, shallots, ginger, chili pepper, and chili paste. Cook for an additional minute.
4. Add the julienned snow peas and red sweet pepper to the skillet. Continue cooking for another 2 minutes, or until the vegetables are just tender.
5. Stir in the sliced green onions and cook for 1 more minute.
6. Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles. Makes 4 small servings.
